raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The query image displays a pattern of parallel horizontal lines with a single vertical line on the left side. This visual characteristic of parallel lines is most similar to the pattern observed in example 22, which features numerous parallel vertical lines. While the orientation differs, the fundamental pattern of distinct, parallel linear elements is shared. The other examples show patterns of polygons (18), irregular veins (23), or circular perforations (27), none of which match the linear pattern of the query image.
</explanation>
<response>22</response>
